game.title: Avión de papel
game.story_connection: Coco and Mango fold a paper airplane and fly it through the stadium

mechanics.core_loop: Steer the paper airplane through the stadium, avoiding walls and obstacles. Collect stars for bonus points.

controls.tilt_or_drag: Move finger up/down to control airplane altitude
controls.swipe: Alternative: swipe up/down for quick altitude change
controls.note: Airplane moves forward automatically, player controls vertical position

physics.gravity: Airplane slowly drifts down if no input
physics.momentum: Smooth transitions, not instant position changes
physics.bounds: Can't go above ceiling or below floor

obstacles.description: Vertical wall with gap to fly through

states.hit: Brief flash, lose life, brief invulnerability
states.ended: Show GameEndScreen with distance and stars

visuals.background: Stadium interior, scrolling bleachers and ceiling
visuals.airplane: White paper airplane, slight wobble animation
visuals.parallax: Optional: background scrolls slower than foreground for depth

instructions_text: ¡Vuela el avión de papel! Toca arriba o abajo para esquivar los obstáculos.
implementation_notes: Classic Flappy Bird style but with smoother controls
Obstacles generate procedurally with gaps at random heights
Gap size decreases slightly as speed increases
Paper airplane SVG with subtle rotation based on velocity
Consider Canvas API for smoother performance if needed
